title: Bayside Shakedown the Final
original_title: 踊る大捜査線 THE FINAL 新たなる希望
overview: Set 2 years after prior film "Bayside Shakedown 3: Set the Guys Loose," a major case occurs that has the potential to take down the entire police organization. For the next 3 days, Shunsaku Aoshima and his colleagues struggle to unravel the case...
